pkgmetadata.longdescription: installer-- start readme-pitch --This is a low-level library for installing a Python package from a[wheel distribution](httpspackaging.python.orgglossaryterm-Wheel). Itprovides basic functionality and abstractions for handling wheels and installingpackages from wheels.- Logic for unpacking a wheel (i.e. installation).- Abstractions for various parts of the unpacking process.- Extensible simple implementations of the abstractions.- Platform-independent Python script wrapper generation.-- end readme-pitch --You can read more in the [documentation](httpsinstaller.rtfd.io).
